description: Validator for the callflow data object

doc_id.description: A document ID of an allowed document to store a callflow ID

flow.description: A callflow node defines a module to execute, data to provide to that module, and zero or more children to branch to

id.description: The Callflow ID to branch to

path.description: The name or path to the variable that should be looked up

oneOf.description: The name of variable/property that should be looked up
Specifies a json path to the variable/property that should be looked up

skip_module.description: When set to true this callflow action is skipped, advancing to the wildcard branch (if any)
